title: Sonic the hedgehog Texture pack
description: This texture pack is gonna make everything in minecraft more...sonicy.
body:
This texture pack is gonna make everything in minecraft more...sonicy.

I plan to change every texture and model eventually, but this pack is far from being finished.
all the textures and models here were made by me but i have taken a lot of inspiration from the official sonic texture pack by gamemode one for minecraft bedrock.

I'm gonna keep working on this pack and keep it updated to the best of my ability

OPTIFINE OR EMF IS REQUIERED FOR THE MODELS TO WORK!

__________

Currently added mobs:

Allay : Chao (different textures by naming: dark, hero, omochao, cheese, chocola, zombot, egg)

Blaze : the fiery orbinaut (i dont know the name)

Chicken : Clucky (or was it cucky?)

Creeper : badnik creeper

Iron golem : Omega

Skeleton : Eggrobo

Spider : Grabber

Vex : dark Chao
